turns.content: bro im about to lose my mind with this 610 construction
The 610 construction is brutal right now. Which section is getting you — the west loop or the south side?
the whole thing bro wallahi. but especially near galleria. they got it down to one lane during rush hour. ONE LANE. on 610. in houston. who approved this

Near the Galleria is the worst possible spot for lane closures. That area is already a nightmare even without construction. Are you able to reroute through Westheimer or Richmond, or does that mess up your timing?
westheimer is just as bad because everyone had the same idea bro. so now you got 610 backed up AND westheimer packed. there is no good option
Yeah, the spillover traffic kills every alternate route. What about San Felipe or cutting through the neighborhood streets south of the Galleria? It's slower speed limit but at least you're moving.
i been trying that. the thing is bro when youre driving for a living every extra 15 minutes stuck in traffic is money lost. like i can feel the dollars disappearing while im sitting there

That's the real hit — it's not just annoying, it's directly cutting into your earnings. Have you thought about shifting your hours to avoid the worst of it? Like hitting that area before 7 AM or after 8 PM?
yeah but the rides during rush hour are the best ones. airport runs downtown pickups. thats where the money is. so you either sit in traffic and make money or avoid it and make less. lose lose
Classic catch-22. The demand is highest exactly when the roads are worst. Do you know how long this construction is supposed to last? Some of these TxDOT projects drag on forever.
bro they said 18 months. 18 MONTHS. and thats the estimate which means probably 3 years knowing how they do things

Yeah, TxDOT estimates are basically fairy tales. That 18 months will quietly become 2+ years. At least when it's done it should help with flow, but that doesn't help you right now. Maybe tracking the construction schedule on the TxDOT site could help you figure out which days the closures are worst?
and the worst part is bro they be working on it at like 2pm on a tuesday and theres nobody even there half the time. like 6 cones up and zero workers. just vibes
That's the most infuriating part of any road construction — lanes closed for miles with nobody in sight. Just orange cones collecting dust. It's like they close the lanes and then take the day off.
EXACTLY. bro i sat in traffic for 40 minutes yesterday and when i finally got past the cones there was literally one dude standing there on his phone. one dude. i almost honked wallahi
Ha, the restraint it takes not to honk in that moment. Forty minutes for one guy on his phone — that's peak Houston construction energy. At least you didn't catch a road rage situation out of it.
nah bro im too tired for road rage lol. alright thanks for letting me vent. ima check that transtar thing you mentioned. back to the grind
Anytime, man. Check the Houston TranStar site — they post real-time lane closures. Might save you some headaches. Good luck out there.
